sentences.text: If the Shvstvecd extension is implemented, then `vstvec.MODE` must be capable of holding the value 0 (Direct).
sentences.section: Preamble > Shvstvecd Extension for Direct Trap Vectoring, Version 1.0

sentences.text: Furthermore, when `vstvec.MODE`=Direct, `vstvec.BASE` must be capable of holding any valid four-byte-aligned address.
sentences.section: Preamble > Shvstvecd Extension for Direct Trap Vectoring, Version 1.0
